title: Enterprise & solution architecture
summary: Coherent target architectures for complex estates — aligning systems, teams and roadmaps so the whole holds together as it grows.

title: System design & integration
summary: Designing how systems fit together: clear boundaries, robust integration and data flows that stay dependable under real-world load.

title: Cloud & Azure architecture
summary: Well-architected cloud on Microsoft Azure — landing zones, infrastructure-as-code and cost-aware designs that scale with the business.

title: Security & certificate lifecycle
summary: Security architecture and certificate-lifecycle management built into the design — informed by shipping CertainGuard, not bolted on later.

title: Modernization & technical strategy
summary: Pragmatic modernization paths and technical strategy — sequencing change so legacy systems evolve without grinding delivery to a halt.

title: Hands-on engineering leadership
summary: Senior, hands-on leadership through delivery — setting direction, raising the engineering bar and staying close to the code that matters.
